items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: Lithium mining stocks broadly fell, US Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, SQM down 3%, Sigma Lithium down over 2%

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Could Be 24.6% Undervalued After Recent Share Price Weakness
items.snippet: Fair value estimated at $212.74 vs last close $160.35. Risks: lithium prices staying weak, industry oversupply.

items.headline: Albemarle raised to buy at Citi with underappreciated growth opportunities ahead
items.snippet: Citi analyst Pat Cunningham upgraded ALB from High Risk to Buy, target $225, noting ALB as primary beneficiary of structural lithium demand tailwinds

items.headline: Lithium Mining Market Generates $5.31 Billion in 2025 with Strong Long-Term Growth Outlook
items.snippet: EV industry drives lithium demand. ALB, SQM, Ganfeng investing billions in new capacity.
